composio_raw.name: Amazon
composio_raw.description: Amazon is an e-commerce giant delivering a massive online marketplace, cloud services, and digital products that connect retailers, consumers, and businesses worldwide for seamless transactions

llm_raw.description: Amazon's comprehensive REST-based API enabling developers to build applications for Amazon Selling Partners to manage orders, inventory, reports, and financial data.
llm_raw.notes: Requires strict Amazon developer registration and application approval process; while technically 'self-serve' for registration, it is highly gated by compliance reviews.
